EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} is unable to execute commands "{object.process.cmdline}" on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
The user {subject.account.name} is executing commands "{object.process.cmdline}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} executed commands "{object.process.cmdline}" on host {event_src.host}
